name: @superdoc-dev/fonts
description: Optional bundled metric-compatible font substitutes for SuperDoc, shipped as bundler-resolvable assets.

scripts.generate: node scripts/generate-asset-urls.mjs && pnpm exec tsx scripts/generate-bundled-families.ts
scripts.build: node scripts/sync-assets.mjs && node scripts/generate-asset-urls.mjs && tsc --project tsconfig.json
scripts.prepare: node scripts/sync-assets.mjs && node scripts/generate-asset-urls.mjs && tsc --project tsconfig.json
